name: copy-cleaner
title: Copy Cleaner
description: Copy Cleaner will read your latest clipboard contents and present you with a list of formatting / cleaning options that will transform your clipboard contents based on the selection that will then be written back to your clipboard for pasting.
author: kristopher_ray_bolleter

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
